hook.name: STRPNKHook
hook.description: Charges a 10% fee on every swap by intercepting beforeSwap and afterSwap, accumulating ETH and token fees as ERC-6909 claims held by the PoolManager. Fees can be swept by anyone and distributed to a treasury and dev wallet (80/20 split for ETH, all to treasury for tokens), with a 0.25% bounty paid to the caller who triggers the sweep.
